description: Quote-card graphic. The right two-thirds is a color photograph of Vice President JD Vance in a navy suit and red tie, smiling and waving with his right arm raised, standing in front of a large American flag in an industrial or hangar event setting. The left third is overlaid with a translucent blue gradient panel carrying a pull-quote in a white serif font: ''We are bringing the United States of America back - We decided to put American businesses &, most importantly, American workers first.'' Below the quote, in spaced gold or tan small caps, the attribution reads 'VICE PRESIDENT VANCE'.
notable_text: 'We are bringing the United States of America back - We decided to put American businesses &, most importantly, American workers first.' - VICE PRESIDENT VANCE
